relations.subject: Rockefeller's sunbird
relations.evidence: This species is only known from the Albertine Rift in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, where it is found in montane forest between 2000 and 3300 m in elevation. Sight records of this species exist from Rwanda and Burundi, but these lack documentation and have yet to be confirmed
